title: libtiff security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.4.0-13.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176 off-by-one error skipping first line in tiffdither
  and tiffmedian
- Resolves: RHEL-120243

[4.4.0-13.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900 buffer underflow in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
- Resolves: RHEL-112542
full_text:
[4.4.0-13.2]
- fix CVE-2025-8176 off-by-one error skipping first line in tiffdither
  and tiffmedian
- Resolves: RHEL-120243

[4.4.0-13.1]
- fix CVE-2025-9900 buffer underflow in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented
- Resolves: RHEL-112542

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19113.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-8176.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-9900.html
